title: Chapter 67
content:
Chapter 67: Chapter 67: Sect Leader Hector

Meanwhile in the building at the tallest spot on the mountain, a man was cultivating suddenly open his eyes at the moment Damon release his full power sword aura.

"What is this? where this aura come from?"

The man opened his eyes in the high chamber. He stood from his cushion and walked to the window. His gaze swept down the mountain slope toward the area far below.

Sword aura. Stronger than any he had felt in years. Only Emperor Realm above who usually can use Sword Aura, but what they have not even comparable with the Sword Aura that he felt just now.

He clenched his fist. "Who have such power in this place?"

Sect Leader Hector, who in seated position immediately stood up and rush toward where the aura come from.

****

Also in the mansion near the sect leader reside, a beautiful alluring woman was sipping a tea calmly on a balcony felt the sudden burst of aura.

"Hoho~ Look like someone is in action~"

Then she felt the sect leader rush out his residence. She already know that Damon can use sword aura, but she kept it secret since he was her daughters man.

Also it seems that Damon also want to keep it hidden. She doesn’t mind a man who keep secret since she like to discover it on her own.

"It seem Hector finally will meet the boy~ Hehehe~ I can’t miss this~" Mei said with excited and sadistic smile.

Then Mei Nightrider put her tea on the table and started to fly to the direction of the aura.

****

Back in Selene’s mansion, after Damon’s sword aura hit Selene’s barrier, a cloud of dust covering the place.

As the dust slowly dissipating Damon found Elder Selene, laying on the ground unconscious with her clothes torn apart.

Exposing her cleavage from her big boobs and her beautiful pale tight. He can see few light injuries on her skin.

Seeing her like that Damon rush to Elder Selene in panic.

’Oh shit, she passed out from the attack.’

Damon then pull out the recovery pill that he bought earlier then immediately shove it into her mouth.

Damon could see that the recovery pill works immediately. Her injuries started to fading until her flawless pale, jade skin back to normal.

’To think my full power already can injure a Peak Heavenly Spirit Realm cultivator with her full power barrier. I think I can even kill Peak Heavenly Spirit Realm cultivator in surprise attack.’

But his thought immediately get distracted. Seeing her defenseless body and her beautiful skin, Damon could help but get a boner, as he felt his dragon waking up.

But excitement suddenly dim down as he felt two aura approaching him. He was familiar with one of them, It was his mother-in-law, Mei Nightwalker. But he didn’t recognize the other one.

Then Damon immediately use his Celestial Incubus Eyes, He can see a man flew toward him.

Then a status appears in front of him.

[Name: Hector Willfriit]

[Age: 133]

[Cultivation: Emperor Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[Affinities: Fire: 100, Earth: 75]

[Spiritual Roots: Molten Spiritual Roots] [Saint Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Lava Spirit] [Saint Grade - High]

[Physique: None]

As Damon saw the status window, he was surprised to see it. Since at first it only activated on a women and after upgrading the Incubus Eyes to Celestial Incubus Eyes, he never use it on men.

Damon then stood up. His golden eyes keep tracking the two incoming auras without a twitch.

Damon activated Incubus Celestial Eyes once more. A status appears in front of him for Mei.

[Name: Mei Nightrider]

[Age: 133]

[Cultivation: Saint Spirit Realm - Ninth Level]

[Relationship: Taking an interest]

[Interest: 80/100]

[Chastity: Broken by Childbirth]

[Lust: 0/100]

[Affinities: Fire: 150, Charm: 150, Illusion: 150]

[Spiritual Roots: Glamour Spiritual Roots] [Sovereign Grade - Peak]

[Bloodline: Blood of Divine Nine-tailed Fox] [Saint Grade - Low]

[Physique: Body of Divine Nine-tailed Fox] [Saint Grade - Low]

[Traits: Seductive, Dominatrix, Manipulative, Big Mommy]

He can see her interest rising from last time he met her.

Damon slipped the empty pill vial into his storage ring. He adjusted his outer disciple robe and stepped back from Selene’s unconscious body.

As Hector landed first, he immediately look at Damon.

"I’m Azure Dragon Sect Leader. Who are you and what did you do to Elder Selene?" Hector asked.

Damon met the sect leader’s stare then he bow at him. "I greet Sect Leader Hector."

"I’m the new inner disciple, Damon. I followed her here for questioning. But she asked me to attack her with my full power. Then she passed out after the blocking my attack."

"Damon... I heard that name before..." Hector began pondering since he heard that name before.

But his thinking got interrupted as Mei descended a moment later. She floated down in her tight Black qipao and landed beside Hector with a soft sway of her hips. Her deep purple hair caught the light.

She glanced at Selene then at Damon with a seductive smile. "My~ my~ Such a powerful boy. We met again, Boy~."

Hector frowned at Mei. "You knew him?"

"You are the one who asked me to protect him since he was promising disciple. I just came to see the fun since you never met him, I expect you react that way~ Also the boy is connected to my daughters after all." As Mei licked her red lips.

"What? You are that, Damon Arcknight? The 18-years- old Sword Master that Elder Alder talk about?" Hector shock hearing that the boy that he saw promising was in front of him.

But the shock didn’t last long, Hector stepped closer to Selene. He checked her breathing then turned back to Damon.

"Anyway, you can tell, me the story later, let’s move Elder Selene inside first. You carry her inside." Hector ask Damon to carry Elder Selene.

Damon nodded. As he approaches Selene unconscious body and lift her up.

Then Hector look at Mei. "Mei, can you help check her condition? You know that Elder Selene is one of the most talented Elder here."

"Sure~" Mei replied with her usual seductive voice.
